files.original_filename: Steps to launch a SaaS tool monetized by agent mic.md
files.rationale: Concrete 10-step playbook for agent-micropayment SaaS. Distinct lane vs the shopping-agent files. Folded into playbook but kept verbatim because steps are operational and worth re-reading.

files.original_filename: I'm a product leader and want to know what to buil.md
files.rationale: Best-in-set on primitives, roadmap by horizon, agent-readiness scorecard. Architecture spine of the playbook.

files.original_filename: What data and systems do retail AI agents need to.md
files.rationale: Cleanest articulation of the minimum data stack; useful as a build checklist.

files.original_filename: “We're still going to be influenced by the people.md
files.rationale: The only file with 10 ranked, Claude-SDK-specific wedge ideas in the user's exact build context. Largest file (14KB), but signal-dense.

files.original_filename: Alibaba (9988.HK) is preparing to unveil the integ.md
files.rationale: Strong case study but single-vendor. All load-bearing facts folded into 'Market truths' in playbook.

files.original_filename: What does this mean for agent-agent commerce in 20.md
files.rationale: Futurism; useful framing on agent-for-human vs agent-for-agent and the rendezvous-point thesis. Folded into 'Strategic implications'.

files.original_filename: Examples of AI personal shoppers like OpenAI Opera.md
files.rationale: Short, mostly duplicate of wedge ideas in the larger 'We're still going to be influenced' file. The 5 'product ideas for Claude SDK' bullets fully subsumed.

files.original_filename: What are top use cases for AI agents in retail 202.md
files.rationale: Generic 'top use cases' overview; every point appears in a more concrete form elsewhere.

notes: Sandbox blocked all write/move operations on this run; intended file moves were not executed. Deliverables returned inline.
All 8 source files mention the year 2026 prominently — that's the user's reference year, not a hallucination.
Several files contain bullish vendor analyst predictions. Did not quarantine — flagged inline in playbook 'Open questions'.
